name: super-skill-memory-harness
description: Automatic memory and dream-replay harness for Super Skill workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Capture verified experience into reusable memory candidates.
interface.longDescription: Adds hook-based memory/dream automation that can capture lightweight session metadata, create reviewable memory candidates, and keep reusable experience outside the always-on prompt until needed.
defaultPrompt: Use agent-memory-dream-loop to review pending memory candidates.
Use agent-memory-dream-loop after a substantial task to promote verified lessons.
